response: A supervisor in a primary care clinic setting needs to praise a medical technician for a letter of appreciation provided by an external stakeholder. The letter mentions that between August 2023 and October 2023, MCpl King volunteered in a committee responsible for organizing the Tri-Mess Battle of the Bands event. Their contributions, including their experience and enthusiasm, were vital to the committee's efforts in planning and executing the event. This support helped enhance the morale and welfare of the members of CFB Kingston and also fostered a positive relationship within the community by encouraging donations to the Partners in Mission Food Bank. Their role as PMC for the Junior Ranks Mess was an essential part of the event's success.
